subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath manifested Himself through His Most Great Name unto the world, whereupon all things proclaimed: "The Kingdom..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی تجلی باسمه الاعظم علی العالم اذا نطقت الاشیاء کلها الملک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @consolation and comfort, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
